title: MICROWAVE-ASSISTED EXTRACTION OF ORANGE PEEL ESSENTIAL OIL: A PERFORMANCE EVALUATION
author: Bodea, Ioana M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This poster presents a study on the optimization of microwave-assisted hydro-distillation (MAHD) for extracting orange essential oils (EOs) from peel waste. MAHD improved the extraction yield and energy efficiency compared to conventional hydro-distillation, achieving faster extraction and cost savings without affecting chemical composition. The study highlights MAHD as a promising green alternative for EO recovery.
steps_raw: This poster presents a study on the optimization of microwave-assisted hydro-distillation (MAHD) for extracting orange essential oils (EOs) from peel waste.
